title: euphorbia variabilis
intro: Euphorbia variabilis, also known as the Candelabra tree or Christmas tree, is a succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, derived from its latex and sap. Euphorbia variabilis has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of Euphorbia variabilis include infusions, decoctions, and creams, which can be used externally to treat various skin conditions and internally to address digestive problems.
